_comment: Design-fidelity gate (round-21, founder-ordered). The handoff PLACEMENT-MAP gives every tier rich components (buyer-card, vs-table, flow, pull-quote, toc/guide-grid, byline-block, meta-reviewed, intake-form, proof-strip, the error-silo problem pattern, stat__delta, diagram-figure). A content page that uses NONE of them is an old-structure carryover on generic primitives only (the audit's core finding). The gate hard-fails such pages UNLESS listed here as known re-pattern debt. A page is removed from this list when it is re-patterned to true handoff fidelity (and then it must keep passing on merit). EXCLUDED from the gate entirely (own patterns): legal docs, 404, the standalone forms (contact/file-review), and pages with no tier surface.
_debt_note: TWO debt classes. (A) GENERIC-PRIMITIVE-ONLY: /about/methodology/ + /trust/ carry no handoff rich component at all — add one at next touch. (B) MIS-TIERED (surfaced 2026-06-14 when check #12 was tightened from a flat 'any rich component' gate to a real PER-TIER assertion against PLACEMENT-MAP): 9 t-bofu service pages were elevated (round 16-18) with hub/mofu components (buyer-card / vs-table / pull-quote) that the map marks '—' for BOFU, but carry NONE of BOFU's own signatures (proof-strip / full intake-form / flow / problem-pattern). The /accounting/payroll-management/ proving page shows the fix: proof-strip under the hero + the full intake-form partial. Re-pattern each of the 9 to add proof-strip + intake-form (and reconcile whether buyer-card/vs-table belong on a conversion page at all, or whether the page is really t-mofu). Remove each from this list when re-patterned; it must then pass per-tier on merit. NOTE: this is the same finding-class the round-21 design audit named — GREEN != implements-the-tier.
